sglang.title: Provide an argument to set the maximum batch size for cuda graph
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Use --max-cuda-graph-bs 8 to limit the cuda graph max bs.
Rename SGLANG_CLIP_MAX_NEW_TOKENS to SGLANG_CLIP_MAX_NEW_TOKENS_ESTIMATION

sglang.title: Improve the user control of new_token_ratio
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Only expose one interface for users, which is --schedule-conservativeness with a default value of 1.0.
There are three variables to control the new_token_ratio. They are

init_new_token_ratio, value = init_new_token_ratio * schedule_conservativeness
min_new_token_ratio, value = init_new_token_ratio

vllm.title: Fix: MI100 Support By Bypassing Custom Paged Attention
vllm.author: MErkinSag
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #8963
Why is it needed?

Currently, Custom Paged Attention for ROCm on vLLM is only supported for MI250 and MI300. This limitation is enforced by the _use_rocm_custom_paged_attention function, which, when run on other GPUs like the MI100, causes the program to hit an UNREACHABLE_CODE path and fa
